svg.aria-label: Chapter 13 summary: Unified Performance Model — Roofline + Multi-Resource Bottleneck + Worked Examples

g.text: Roofline + multi-resource bottleneck framework · 6+1 pipes · 14 co-issue pairs · <20% prediction error
6 resource pipes + TMA 7th bottleneck · 110 SMs · 4 SMSP/SM · 440 issue slots
TMA: 14.50 B/cyc peak · TC consumes 10× TMA rate @ILP=4
T_eff = max(T_A, T_B) + (1 - r_overlap) × min(T_A, T_B)
All 133+ parameters empirically measured (no theoretical priors) — prediction error <5% for large TC-bound GEMM
TMA at 14.50 B/cyc = seventh bottleneck pipe; TC consumes 10× TMA delivery rate at ILP=4
Practical BF16 crossover at AI ≈ 400-500 FLOP/byte (1.8× theoretical 220) due to L2 caching
CAQR GPU equation validated at 0.5% error; Amdahl/Little/AMAT all confirmed within measurement noise
